title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at AIIMS

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at AIIMS
jsonLd.description:
AIIMS, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About AIIMS:
AIIMS is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
